blockingIssues.description: The rerun now launches `MainActivity` and uses real recreation, but the critical connect/reconnect actions still call `SshSessionCoordinator.connect(hostId)` directly after merely asserting the visible `session_connect_<id>` button is displayed, so connect proof remains coordinator-driven instead of being exercised through the shipped session UI.

The trust flow still calls `SshSessionCoordinator.submitHostTrustDecision(true)` after checking that the prompt is visible instead of pressing the `session_trust_accept` UI control, so host-key acceptance is still not proven end to end through the real app-shell surface.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented that `createAndroidComposeRule<MainActivity>()` launches before ordinary `@Before`, so app-state resets needed before `MainActivity` binds Room/DataStore/AppContainer must use a pre-launch rule such as `RuleChain` or `ExternalResource`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Make app-shell proof guidance explicit that helpers must tap visible session UI nodes (for example `session_connect_*`, `session_reconnect_*`, and `session_trust_accept`) instead of only asserting those nodes are visible before calling coordinator APIs directly.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review of `session-ui-real-app-shell-and-relaunch-proof` found the fix moved to `MainActivity` and `ActivityScenario.recreate()`, but `app/src/androidTest/kotlin/io/github/jtsang4/aterm/SessionSshFixtureInstrumentedTest.kt` still uses `coordinator.connect(hostId)` and `coordinator.submitHostTrustDecision(true)` for the key visible actions, while the worker handoff still marked procedure compliance.
